ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water sample */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sample was collected */,
  "state_lgd_code" INTEGER /* Local government district code for the state */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the sample was collected */,
  "district_lgd_code" INTEGER /* Local government district code for the district */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the sample was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the sample was collected */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the object */,
  "ground_water_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground water station */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the sampling location */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the sampling location */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_time" TEXT /* Time the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., ground water, surface water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Arsenic, Calcium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the result belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter in the sample */,
  "sampling_instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for sampling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_sampling_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampling_instrument_id") REFERENCES sampling_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES water_quality_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the sampling location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., river, lake, ground water station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the standard applies to */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Value of the standard for the parameter */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., minimum, maximum, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_standards_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES water_quality_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., water sampler, pH meter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the sample */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_comments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the water source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of water source (e.g., ground water, surface water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_source" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the sample belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_source_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES water_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the trend applies to */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend for the parameter */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was calculated */,
  "trend_time" TEXT /* Time when the trend was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_recipients" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_time" TEXT /* Time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id")
)
